title: Rolson 10808 400 g Chipping Hammer Hickory Shaft
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring them innovative products, all at the possible margins and this year is no different. To date, they have over 250 exciting and innovative products to whet their appetite, together with a host of new in store packaging and point of sale material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal. The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to their existing lines. They bring product combinations that bring originality. Rolson 10808 400 g Chipping Hammer Hickory Shaft A Mini Mattock and Pick resembles a small handheld pickaxe. It is also known as a Chipping hammer with point and chisel head This has a 400 gr head 250 mm long with a pick on one end and a 40 mm wide mattock on the other. The strong but lightweight wooden hickory handle is more traditional. Hickory is strong but light weight hardwood. The head is made from drop forged steel for extra strength with a resin seal for an extra secure fixing.
